title: IMF Paper: Dollar Stablecoins May Aid FX Access but Amplify Currency Runs
dek: An IMF working paper argues that dollar stablecoins could improve foreign-exchange access while also amplifying currency runs. The framing is expected to feed into global regulatory debates.
author: Crypto Cronkite
key_fact: An IMF working paper frames dollar stablecoins as both an FX-access tool and a potential currency-run amplifier.
body: An IMF working paper argues that dollar stablecoins could improve foreign-exchange access while also amplifying currency runs.
The paper's framing positions stablecoins as both a potential benefit and a risk, a dual view expected to feed into global regulatory debates on dollar-denominated stablecoins.
